title: DNP3 DL/Transport Parse + FC Classify — Pure Core (VP-023 Kani)

trajectory.note: P7-F1 was a duplicate / already-resolved restatement; classification remained CLEAN; converged

findings.summary: FC classify missing edge-cases for reserved/vendor-specific FC bytes
parse_dnp3_data_link_header did not guard minimum-length before indexing data[3]
transport header FIR/FIN bit extraction used wrong bit mask
Dnp3FcClass exhaustiveness: CONFIRM (0x00) was mapped to Unknown instead of Management
findings.resolution_route: FIXED — VP-023 v1.4 spec bump (0x00→Management locked); fix in impl

findings.summary: Frame-len formula off-by-one in comment vs. implementation (CRC block count)
VP-023 Sub-B Kani harness did not cover all FC byte values (loop bound was 0xFE not 0xFF)
BC-2.15.005 trace comment missing in classify_dnp3_fc implementation
gate-before-count: is_valid_dnp3_frame_header not called before entering frame-walk in caller path (overlaps SEC-106-001)
findings.resolution_route: DEFERRED to STORY-107 (frame-walk lives in STORY-107; carry-forward SEC-106-001)

findings.summary: Sub-C Kani harness validity-gate assertion could be strengthened with a second assume
Doc comment for Dnp3FcClass::Management missing CONFIRM (0x00) in example list
findings.resolution_route: DEFERRED — cosmetic; recorded as DOC-106-001; target next dnp3.rs touch

findings.summary: BC-2.15.004 PC4 caller-side parse_errors increment path not explicitly tested
findings.resolution_route: DEFERRED to STORY-107 per carry-forward STORY-107-CARRY-001 (parse_errors lives in flow-state story)

findings.summary: Sub-D frame-len Kani harness: upper bound assume could be tightened to max 292
parse_dnp3_transport_header: sequence number extraction mask comment incorrectly stated 7-bit vs 6-bit
Restatement of B4/DOC-106-001 (CONFIRM in doc comment); already recorded as deferred carry-forward
findings.resolution_route: DUPLICATE — already tracked as DOC-106-001; no new fix required; classification CLEAN maintained

spec_bumps.change: locked 0x00 CONFIRM → Management in Sub-B + Management-set Kani assertion
input-hash b465d38 regenerated after VP-023/BC-2.15.005 edits

security_review: APPROVE_WITH_NOTES — 0 CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM; SEC-106-001 (CWE-129) + SEC-106-002 (CWE-400) as carry-forwards
